vectors.description: Default headless Chromium emits UA containing HeadlessChrome/<ver>
vectors.fix_strategy: Set explicit userAgent context option AND --user-agent= Chromium launch arg in both runners (Page+Worker coverage).

vectors.description: fpScanner checks property existence via `'webdriver' in navigator`, not its value
vectors.fix_strategy: delete Navigator.prototype.webdriver and delete navigator.webdriver; fallback to undefined-getter only if delete fails

vectors.test_name: Plugins Length (Old) / Plugins is of type PluginArray
vectors.description: Headless reports zero plugins; naive mocks use [1,2,3,4,5] which is itself a tell
vectors.fix_strategy: Build realistic PluginArray with 5 PDF Viewer plugin family, each Object.create(Plugin.prototype)

vectors.description: Probe: navigator.plugins.item(2**32) === navigator.plugins[0]. Real Chrome truncates index to uint32

vectors.fix_strategy: Each fake MimeType's enabledPlugin getter returns its parent fakePlugin reference

vectors.description: Real Chrome has chrome.app, chrome.csi, chrome.loadTimes, full chrome.runtime with PlatformOs enums
vectors.fix_strategy: Construct full chrome global with all four sub-objects and runtime enums; chrome.runtime.id returns undefined

vectors.description: permissions.query notifications returning denied while Notification.permission is default is a known headless inconsistency
vectors.fix_strategy: Override permissions.query for notifications: return state matching Notification.permission; force Notification.permission to 'default' when denied

vectors.description: Sec-CH-UA HTTP headers and navigator.userAgentData.brands leak HeadlessChrome
vectors.fix_strategy: Set extraHTTPHeaders for Sec-CH-UA/Mobile/Platform AND mock navigator.userAgentData with Chrome 146 brand triple and getHighEntropyValues

vectors.description: Page-level CDP setUserAgentOverride does NOT reach Service Worker contexts; SW reports HeadlessChrome
vectors.fix_strategy: Pass --user-agent=<UA> as Chromium launch arg (browser-process-global, covers Workers)

vectors.description: Page locale via CDP override diverges from Worker locale read from OS env
vectors.fix_strategy: Derive locale from process.env.LC_ALL || LC_MESSAGES || LANG; set context.locale AND --lang= launch arg; if empty, leave both unset

vectors.description: Headless reports rtt=0; real Chrome rounds to nearest 25ms with privacy budget
vectors.fix_strategy: Unconditionally mock navigator.connection with rtt=50, downlink=10, effectiveType='4g', type='wifi'

vectors.description: Headless reports Google SwiftShader as renderer; real Chrome uses platform-mapped ANGLE strings
vectors.fix_strategy: Patch WebGLRenderingContext.prototype.getParameter (and WebGL2) for UNMASKED_VENDOR_WEBGL (37445) and UNMASKED_RENDERER_WEBGL (37446); map from navigator.platform

vectors.description: Anti-bots call Function.prototype.toString on overridden getters and detect non-native bodies
vectors.fix_strategy: Proxy Function.prototype.toString with apply trap; maintain WeakMap of patched fns -> fake native-code strings; asNative(name, fn) helper for every override

vectors.description: Real Chrome clamps Element.scrollLeft setter to int>=0
vectors.fix_strategy: Override Element.prototype.scrollLeft setter to Math.max(0, Math.floor(value))

vectors.description: Headless containers often report hardwareConcurrency=1; real devices have 4+
vectors.fix_strategy: Override Navigator.prototype.hardwareConcurrency getter to 8 when value < 4

vectors.description: Headless reports outerHeight=outerWidth=0; real Chrome reports inner + browser-chrome
vectors.fix_strategy: When 0, override window.outerHeight to innerHeight+85, outerWidth to innerWidth

vectors.description: about:blank iframe.contentWindow.chrome is missing when only top-level was patched
vectors.fix_strategy: Override HTMLIFrameElement.prototype.contentWindow getter to propagate window.chrome
